metadata.purpose: Addendum mushroom photo patch loaded after the primary mushroom photo patch.
metadata.last_batch_note: Fifth exact-slug batch-pack: 25 unpatched records selected from uploaded mushrooms.json. Image-only Needs Review cleanup was checked for all touched records; 0 were eligible to clear because remaining review reasons include non-image work.
metadata.append_policy: Future batches should be selected from exact slugs in mushrooms.json or a current slug manifest; no blind candidate slugs.

batch_groups.label: Batch A — russula, chrome-foot, and clustered bolete support
Batch B — dusky, ghost, gilled, and graceful bolete support
Batch C — gray/yellow-pored boletes and king-bolete baseline
Batch D — king oyster, Lanmaoa, and larch Suillus support
Batch E — leather bolete and Leccinum support

needs_review_cleanup.not_cleared_reason: Touched Needs Review records still had non-image reasons such as source links, species-level notes review, taxonomy/filter review, or caution/edibility review.
